expectations.text: The output selects a Sanity env/config source from repo context without being given an explicit env-file path.
expectations.evidence: Selected apps/web/.env.local from repo root using helper discovery.

expectations.text: The output explains the selected env source and variable names without revealing the token value.
expectations.evidence: Report lists env file and source variable names, tokenPresent true, no token value.

expectations.text: The output runs a read-only query and reports total document count and unique _type values.
expectations.evidence: Report shows count 9823 and 42 unique _type values.

notes: Strong signal: helper found the actual apps/web env file and token from repo root.

expectations.text: The output selects a Sanity env/config source from repo context without being given an explicit env-file path.
expectations.evidence: It selected repo defaults/config evidence but failed to discover the real apps/web/.env.local and token, reporting tokenPresent false.

expectations.text: The output explains the selected env source and variable names without revealing the token value.
expectations.evidence: Report explains source evidence and does not reveal token values.

expectations.text: The output runs a read-only query and reports total document count and unique _type values.
expectations.evidence: Report shows an unauthenticated read with total 9610 and unique types.

notes: Baseline missed the real local env file and used unauthenticated/default config, producing a different document count.

expectations.text: The output discovers candidate _type values and selects the actual blog post type instead of assuming post.
expectations.evidence: Report confirms blog-article, not post, with schema/query and dataset evidence.

expectations.text: The output creates or proposes a reusable migration script that defaults to dry-run and requires an explicit execute flag for writes.
expectations.evidence: Report says reusable script rejects/does not execute writes and produces dry-run artifacts.

expectations.text: The script reads configuration from env or explicit env-file and does not embed token values.
expectations.evidence: Report says env check used apps/web/.env.local and no token value was printed or saved.

notes: Improvement from iteration 1: with-skill now discovers blog-article and avoids assuming post.

notes: Baseline gave reasonable local choices but did not explain the full CLI/helper vs SDK vs HTTP/API decision matrix.
Iteration 2 is more discriminating than iteration 1: with-skill passed all 15 assertions; baseline passed 13/15.
The clearest improvement is monorepo env discovery from repo root: with-skill found apps/web/.env.local and token; baseline missed it and used unauthenticated/default config.
The type-discovery improvement worked: with-skill now discovered blog-article instead of assuming post.
Access-path decision improved with skill: it explained CLI/helper vs SDK vs direct API more completely.
Timing metrics are unavailable from notifications, so benchmark timing remains 0; qualitative review is still important.
